questionHtml: By dividing the area between the curve and the x‐axis into two trapezoids of unequal width show that A>14.5, justifying the direction of the inequality.
markschemeHtml:
12×2×2+3.5+12×4×3.5+1        (M1)(A1)

=14.5        A1

This is an underestimate as the trapezoids are enclosed by (are under) the curve.        R1

 

Note: This can be shown in a diagram.

 

[4 marks]

meta.title: By dividing the area between the curve and the x‐axis into two trapezoids of unequal width show that A>14.5, justifying the direction of the inequality.
